title: Improvements of certain results of the class $\mathcal{S}$ of univalent functions
summary: For $f\in \mathcal{S}$, the class univalent functions in the unit disk $\mathbb{D}$ and given by $f(z)=z+\sum_{n=2}^{\infty} a_n z^n$ for $z\in \mathbb{D}$, we improve previous bounds for the second and third Hankel determinants in case when either $a_2=0,$ or $a_3=0$. We also improve an upper bound for the coefficient difference $|a_4|-|a_3|$ when $f\in \mathcal{S}$.
